positive: Minimalist geometric mountain landscape silhouette, stylized with sharp peaks and clean lines, rendered in solid deep teal and burnt orange against a cream background. The composition is centered, featuring several overlapping abstract mountain shapes that evoke depth and scale. High contrast, vector art style, clean edges, suitable for apparel printing, perfect symmetry, simple yet striking. Trending on ArtStation, highly detailed.
